title: Evaluating the LEVI Fund process
body: "The Local Electric Vehicle Infrastructure (LEVI) fund aims to:   provide a step-change in the deployment of local, primarily low power, on-street charging infrastructure across England accelerate the commercialisation of and investment in the local charging infrastructure sector   This research focuses on the progress of the LEVI fund up until May 2024, which includes:   capability funding pilot funding Tranche 1 capital funding   Frontier Economics and SYSTRA were commissioned to complete this research on behalf of the Department for Transport.  "
